_comment: verify-improvement-plan M3.1 hook manifest. Includes the M1.4 cross-stage anchor side: check_evidence_id_referenced enforces that every command/result_evidence entry references a valid breakdown required_evidence[].id (H3 primary key). M3.1 adds 10 additional hooks for worker/reviewer boundary, E2E control, gate prerequisites, AC evidence sufficiency, failure-path enforcement, and PostToolUse sensors.

hooks.purpose: Block stage complete unless every command/result_evidence references a valid breakdown required_evidence id.
Block verification-effectiveness-reviewer from writing files; reviewer is readonly.
Block verification-engineer from writing files outside the allowed write_scope (verification-report, traces, approvals).
Block direct Playwright/npm-e2e commands when e2e.enabled=true; must use `harness verify e2e-status`.
Block `harness gate advance` / `harness contract advance` until command_evidence_collected, gate PASS, and contradictions PASS.
Block ac_trace[*].conclusion=pass patches that lack command + result evidence; UI ACs require screenshot/video/dom.
Block Edit/Write to src/** or tests/** during verify unless a typed failure_path record exists.
Sensor: append context_reads trace event when mission-contract/execution-brief/code-review/project-context are read.
Sensor: write dispatch envelope to trace and set reviewer_turn/worker_turn flag files.
Sensor: write command_evidence_collected.flag after successful evidence command collect or verify run-tests.
Sensor: rebuild evidence_graph.json from ac_trace after contract patch/add-execution-result calls.
